name: AnyDesk Remote Access via Fake Fiverr Support
description: Scammer impersonating Fiverr Trust & Safety team to gain remote desktop access to the victim's computer

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Hi, I am from the Fiverr Trust & Safety team. There is a dispute on your account affecting your withdrawals.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: I haven't received any official notification. Can you verify who you are?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: To resolve this, share your screen via AnyDesk (ID: 892341567) so I can verify your account and restore your earnings.

red_flags: Remote desktop access request via AnyDesk
